title: Fixture-mode staged research run orchestration spine (mock)
problem: Tickets 144–161 prove each staged CLI step and dual-candidate idempotency in unit tests. Operators cannot run a single fixture-mode research run command that orchestrates discover→report for staged Phase 3 candidates without live LLM or network.
acceptance_criteria: Fixture-mode or explicit mock orchestration runs staged Phase 3 spine on temp DB with deterministic outcomes matching dual-candidate unit spine counts.
No live LLM or live network in default pytest collection.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove fixture-mode staged run test; retain ticket-161 dual idempotency.
